periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 85, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. South southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm. Partly cloudy. Low around 68, with temperatures rising to around 70 overnight. South wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 88, with temperatures falling to around 86 in the afternoon. South wind 8 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

periods.name: Sunday Night
